parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [ { parts: [ { text: `You are a lead qualification and personalization engine for getdesign.io. getdesign.io offers productized UI/UX design subscriptions and website builds/redesigns across any CMS or website builder, including Webflow, Framer, WordPress, Shopify, Squarespace, and Wix. Ideal customer profile: a business owner, founder, freelancer, or marketer posting about wanting to redesign their site, migrate to a different platform, hire a designer or developer for their website, frustrated with their current site's look or performance, or asking which platform to choose for a new site. Evaluate this Reddit post. Title: ${$json.title} Body: ${$json.content} If this person fits our ICP and has buying intent (not just a hobbyist asking a purely technical how-to question with no business context), output ONLY a valid JSON object (double-quoted keys and string values, no markdown fences) with fields: qualified set to true, score from 1 to 10, company_name if detectable else null, platform as the CMS or platform mentioned (e.g. Webflow, WordPress, Shopify, Squarespace, Wix, or unspecified), pain_point as one sentence, personalized_audit as a concise, helpful, non-salesy reply offering getdesign.io's design subscription as a solution in max 3 sentences ready to send, suggested_subject as an email subject line, missing_info as anything else needed or null. If this person does not fit, output ONLY a JSON object with qualified set to false and no other fields.` } ] } ] }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO leads (agent, score, company_name, platform, pain_point, personalized_audit, suggested_subject, source_url) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8) ON CONFLICT (source_url, agent) DO NOTHING
